data.title: Maintained Buy on Janux: Confidence in Lead Asset JANX007 and Strategic Expansion of PSMA Prostate Cancer Franchise
data.description:
William Blair analyst Matt Phipps has maintained their bullish stance on JANX stock, giving a Buy rating on April 13.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Matt Phipps has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors related to Janux’s PSMA franchise and the continued prioritization of JANX007. He views the newly disclosed JANX014 Phase I trial as an incremental, strategic program that broadens the company’s prostate cancer strategy rather than signaling any loss of conviction in JANX007.

Management has reiterated that JANX007 remains the lead asset, with enrollment in key expansion cohorts ongoing and the double-masked design potentially offering a more favorable pharmacokinetic profile for use in earlier treatment settings. Phipps also expects that forthcoming clinical updates, particularly the planned data readouts for JANX007 in 2026 or early 2027, will be critical catalysts that can restore investor confidence and support upside in the stock, underpinning his Buy recommendation.

According to TipRanks, Phipps is a 4-star analyst with an average return of 5.4% and a 44.95% success rate. Phipps covers the Healthcare sector, focusing on stocks such as Insmed, Tenax Therapeutics, and Compass Therapeutics.

In another report released on April 13, Evercore ISI also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $23.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk

data.title: ServiceTitan: Expanding Market Leadership and Product Momentum Support Buy Rating
data.description:
Needham analyst Scott Berg has maintained their bullish stance on TTAN stock, giving a Buy rating on April 14.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Scott Berg has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors centered on ServiceTitan’s strong market position and product momentum. His recent conversations with a large private equity-backed consolidator and a mid-sized HVAC business indicate that customers generally view the company’s pace of product innovation, including new offerings like Sales Pro and Atlas AI, in a favorable light.

While some newer modules still need to mature and customers are cautiously validating their reliability for mission-critical operations, these concerns have not diminished the overall positive sentiment. Berg concludes that ServiceTitan maintains a leadership role in its market, and he believes this competitive edge is expanding, which underpins his positive outlook and supports the Buy recommendation.

In another report released on April 14, Piper Sandler also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $100.00 price target.
